task: Phase 12A T130 audit anomaly dataset schema design

features.name: sample_id
features.description: Stable row identifier for generated or curated samples.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Traceability column excluded from model inputs.

features.name: invoice_id
features.description: Invoice represented by this dataset row.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Join/debug column excluded from model inputs.

features.name: generated_scenario
features.description: Scenario key for synthetic or curated examples.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Scenario coverage column excluded from model inputs.

features.name: label
features.description: Supervised label where 0 means normal and 1 means anomaly.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Target value, not an input feature.

features.name: edit_count
features.description: Number of invoice update events.
features.anomalyInterpretation: High edit volume can indicate tampering, OCR instability, or review churn.

features.name: approve_count
features.description: Number of transitions to approved.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Multiple approvals can indicate reopen/reapprove loops.

features.name: reject_count
features.description: Number of transitions to rejected.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Repeated rejection can signal disputed or inconsistent invoice data.

features.name: status_changed_count
features.description: Number of detected status changes.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Excessive lifecycle movement can indicate unusual handling.

features.name: distinct_user_count
features.description: Count of distinct users involved in the invoice audit trail.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Too many users can indicate handoff confusion or unauthorized intervention.

features.name: validation_count
features.description: Number of validation attempts.
features.source: AuditLogEntry.ActionType = Validated and validation issue records.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Repeated validation may indicate unstable or manually forced data.

features.name: export_count
features.description: Number of export events.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Multiple exports or exports in bad states can indicate downstream risk.

features.name: subtotal_change_ratio
features.description: Largest relative subtotal change.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Large subtotal changes are financially sensitive.

features.name: tax_change_ratio
features.description: Largest relative tax amount change.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Large tax changes can signal calculation or fraud risk.

features.name: total_change_ratio
features.description: Largest relative total amount change.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Large total changes directly affect payment value.

features.name: vendor_changed
features.description: Whether vendor changed after creation.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Vendor changes can redirect payment or hide duplicate invoices.

features.name: invoice_number_changed
features.description: Whether invoice number changed after creation.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Invoice number changes can affect duplicate detection and audit trail integrity.

features.name: currency_changed
features.description: Whether currency changed after creation.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Currency changes can drastically alter accounting interpretation.

features.name: edited_after_approved
features.description: Whether an update happened after approval.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Approved data should be stable; later edits are high-risk.

features.name: exported_after_rejected
features.description: Whether export occurred after rejection.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Rejected invoices should not proceed to downstream export.

features.name: outside_business_hours
features.description: Whether any meaningful event happened outside configured business hours.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Off-hours changes may warrant review in finance workflows.

features.name: has_deleted_line_item
features.description: Whether an invoice line item was deleted.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Deleting line items can hide amount mismatches or alter totals.

features.name: has_reopened_invoice
features.description: Whether invoice moved from approved/rejected back to review.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Reopen flows are legitimate but riskier than straight-through approval.

features.name: total_tax_mismatch
features.description: Whether declared totals or tax do not match calculated values or unresolved validation issues.
features.source: Invoice amounts, invoice line items, validation issue records.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Amount inconsistencies are strong anomaly signals.

features.name: repeated_processing_attempts
features.description: Whether processing repeated beyond normal retry expectations.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Repeated processing can indicate OCR/parser failure or manual manipulation.

features.name: minutes_between_create_and_approve
features.description: Minutes from invoice creation to first approval; 0 when never approved.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Extremely fast approval or very delayed approval can be suspicious depending on context.

features.name: max_updates_within_10_minutes
features.description: Maximum update count in any rolling 10-minute window.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Bursts of edits can indicate rapid tampering or unstable data entry.

features.name: audit_duration_minutes
features.description: Minutes between first and last audit event for the invoice.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Very long or unusually short lifecycles can stand out from normal patterns.

features.name: anomaly_reason_codes
features.description: Optional semicolon-delimited reason codes for generated anomaly examples.
features.source: Generated dataset metadata or analyst notes.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Explanatory column excluded from model inputs.

features.name: notes
features.description: Optional notes for sample review.
features.source: Generated dataset metadata or analyst notes.
features.anomalyInterpretation: Explanatory column excluded from model inputs.
